summary: Breaking news alerts, celebratory dashboard greetings, and ⇧⌘V opens the clipboard picker without pasting.

introduced: Breaking news modal appears the first time an urgent headline arrives — larger text, Speak, and Open story with a blurred backdrop
changed: Dashboard greeting celebrates weekends and public holidays for your location and selected countries
⇧⌘V opens the clipboard history picker only — selecting a clip copies it; press ⌘V to paste (requires Accessibility permission to block Paste and Match Style globally)
